variant: Business PowerLite / EB / EMP (IRDB Projector, 57 cmds, NEC2 @131,85)
notes: Captured from a generic Epson business-projector remote.
Same protocol family as the ESC/VP21-controllable RS232 lineup —
use this if you want IR control of those units (no serial cable).
Best coverage: 57 named commands including all menu nav, source switches,
Stored as raw timing arrays — firmware lacks a named NEC2 path, raw fallback works.
Carrier: 38 kHz. NEC pulse-distance: 9000/4500us header, 560us bit, 560us '0' space, 1690us '1' space.
